UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user account within the Local HelpLink platform, including their profile details, role, and reputation.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

name.description: The full name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

phone.description: The phone number of the user.

location.description: Geographical location details of the user.

role.description: The role assigned to the user within the platform (e.g., normal user, volunteer, service provider, admin).

skills.description: A list of skills possessed by the user, particularly relevant for volunteers and service providers.

rating.description: The average rating received by the user based on their helpfulness and service.

totalHelped.description: A count of how many requests the user has successfully helped with.

verified.description: Indicates whether the user's identity or skills have been verified.

fcmToken.description: Firebase Cloud Messaging token for sending push notifications to the user's device.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

HelpRequest.title: HelpRequest
HelpRequest.description: Represents a request for help posted by a user, including its details, status, and associated location.

id.description: Unique identifier for the HelpRequest entity.

title.description: A concise title for the help request.

description.description: A detailed description of the help needed.

category.description: The category of the help request.

location.description: Geographical location details where the help is needed.

urgency.description: The level of urgency for the request.

status.description: The current status of the request (e.g., open, accepted, completed, expired).

createdBy.description: Reference to the UserProfile who created this request.

acceptedBy.description: Reference to the UserProfile who accepted this request, if any.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the request was created.

expiresAt.description: Timestamp when the request is set to automatically expire.

responseTime.description: The time taken in minutes for a helper to accept the request after it was posted.

RequestRating.title: RequestRating
RequestRating.description: Represents a rating given by one user to another after the completion of a help request.

id.description: Unique identifier for the RequestRating entity.

requestId.description: Reference to the HelpRequest for which this rating was given.

fromUser.description: Reference to the UserProfile who gave this rating.

toUser.description: Reference to the UserProfile who received this rating.

score.description: The numerical score of the rating, typically on a scale of 1 to 5.

comment.description: An optional textual comment accompanying the rating.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the rating was created.

definition.description: Stores individual help requests posted by users.
Stores ratings given for completed help requests.
Dedicated collection for managing global administrator roles.
